name: Черни връх
description: The highest peak of Vitosha Mountain, standing at 2290m. A beloved destination for Sofia locals offering panoramic views of the city and surrounding mountains.
tips: Start early to avoid afternoon clouds. The Aleko hut is a great rest stop on the way up.

name: Мусала
description: The highest peak in Bulgaria and the entire Balkan Peninsula at 2925m. A challenging but rewarding climb through the Rila Mountains.
tips: Stay overnight at the Musala hut to catch the sunrise. Check weather forecasts carefully.

name: Седемте рилски езера
description: Seven glacial lakes in the Rila Mountains, each named after a distinctive feature. One of Bulgaria's most iconic natural landmarks.
tips: Take the chairlift from Panichishte to save energy. The lakes are busiest in summer.

name: Рилски манастир
description: The largest and most famous Eastern Orthodox monastery in Bulgaria, founded in the 10th century. A UNESCO World Heritage Site.
tips: Dress modestly when entering the monastery. The frescoes in the main church are breathtaking.

name: Белоградчишки скали
description: Extraordinary sandstone and limestone rock formations rising up to 200m, shaped over millions of years into bizarre and fascinating shapes.
tips: The fortress built among the rocks is worth visiting. Best light for photos is at golden hour.

name: Пловдив Стария град
description: One of the oldest continuously inhabited cities in the world. The old town features stunning National Revival architecture and Roman ruins.
tips: Walk up Nebet Tepe hill for the best panoramic view. The Roman amphitheatre hosts live performances.

name: Варна морска градина
description: The largest sea garden in Bulgaria, stretching along the Black Sea coast. Features beautiful paths, the Dolphinarium and the Naval Museum.
tips: Visit at sunset for stunning views over the Black Sea. The aquarium is worth a stop.

name: Казанлък розова долина
description: The famous Rose Valley producing 85% of the world's rose oil. Visit during the Rose Festival in May and June for a magical experience.
tips: The rose harvest happens at dawn. Book accommodation well in advance for the festival period.

name: Царевец
description: A medieval stronghold in Veliko Tarnovo, the capital of the Second Bulgarian Empire. The fortress offers spectacular views over the Yantra River gorge.
tips: Attend the Sound and Light show in the evening. The climb to Baldwin's Tower is steep but worth it.

name: Сребърна
description: A UNESCO biosphere reserve and home to over 100 bird species including the rare Dalmatian pelican. A pristine lake ecosystem by the Danube.
tips: Bring binoculars for birdwatching. The best time to visit is spring during nesting season.

name: Пирин Тевно езеро
description: A stunning glacial lake in the Pirin National Park, surrounded by dramatic marble peaks. One of the most beautiful spots in the southern Balkans.
tips: The trail from Bezbog hut is well marked. Bring warm clothing even in summer.

name: Мадарски конник
description: A UNESCO World Heritage Site featuring a large relief of a horseman carved into a 100m cliff face, dating from the 8th century.
tips: Use binoculars to see the relief details from the viewing area. The cliff walk is also spectacular.

name: Копривщица
description: A beautifully preserved town featuring National Revival architecture, cobblestone streets and colourful houses. The birthplace of the April Uprising of 1876.
tips: Visit the six house-museums for a glimpse into 19th century Bulgarian life. Very photogenic at any time of year.

name: Девин Горна Арда
description: A spectacular river gorge in the Rhodope Mountains with crystal clear waters and lush vegetation. Popular for swimming and eco-tourism.
tips: The water is cold even in summer. Local restaurants serve excellent Rhodope cuisine.

name: Шипченски проход
description: The historic mountain pass where Bulgarian and Russian forces fought a decisive battle during the Russo-Turkish War of 1877-78. A symbol of Bulgarian liberation.
tips: Climb the 894 steps to the Freedom Monument for panoramic views. The museum has fascinating exhibits.
